findings.issue: Missing object ownership check on invoice resource
findings.evidence_span: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a filter that ensures the invoice belongs to the authenticated user (owner_id) or the same tenant (tenant_id) before returning the invoice object.

findings.issue: Information leakage in denial response body
findings.evidence_span: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Do not include the invoice_id in the denial response; return a generic error message instead.
